solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public int findNthDigit(int n) {
        int length = 1;
        long count = 9;
        long start = 1;

        while (n > length * count) {
            n -= length * count;
            length++;
            count *= 10;
            start *= 10;
        }

        int num = start + (n - 1) / length;
        return Integer.toString(num).charAt((n - 1) % length) - '0';
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
